productDisplayName: Nike Men's Dual Fusion Grey Shoe
description: With plush cushioning and a supportive Fit, the nike Dual Fusion ST running shoe is perfect for runners who have a neutral to slightly overpronated gait. Lightweight and comfortable, this shoe also doubles up as a great everyday wear for those who love those long walks.Upper Soft, single-layer mesh for breathable comfort Perforated, internal fit saddle work with lacing system for a comfortable, snug fit Strategically placed overlays for lightweight support to the midfoot Internal heel counter works with external heel overlays for snug stability Gilly lacing system for a supportive fit and to lock the foot in place EVA sockliner offers plush comfort and performance Midsole Dual-density phylon midsole with softer foam in the centre and firmer foam on the perimeter for a unique blend of lightweight cushioning and enhanced support Moulded piping on the firmer density foam to act as a crash pad for smoother transition from heelstrike Mildly cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Solid rubber waffle outsole for maximum cushioning and optimal traction on various surfaces Forefoot flex grooves for a more natural range of motion Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
